name: Mark stale pull requests
pipeline: {"Steps":[],"Env":null,"RemainingFields":{"jobs":{"stale":{"runs-on":"ubuntu-latest","permissions":{"pull-requests":"write","contents":"write"},"env":{"DAYS_BEFORE_STALE":14,"DAYS_BEFORE_CLOSE":21},"steps":[{"uses":"actions/stale@1160a2240286f5da8ec72b1c0816ce2481aabf84","with":{"repo-token":"${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}","days-before-pr-stale":"${{ env.DAYS_BEFORE_STALE }}","days-before-pr-close":"${{ env.DAYS_BEFORE_CLOSE }}","stale-pr-message":"This pull request is stale because it has been open for ${{ env.DAYS_BEFORE_STALE }} days with no activity.
